title: Law Without Borders: Expanding Our Global Reach 🇨🇦 + More!
description: LawGlance is going global! We're significantly expanding our legal knowledge base to include jurisdictions like Canada and beyond. Soon, you'll have access to a truly worldwide legal resource at your fingertips.
coverage: LawGlance is going global! We're significantly expanding our legal knowledge base to include jurisdictions like Canada and beyond. Soon, you'll have access to a truly worldwide legal resource at your fingertips.
